subject: 4 jcode-planned rows owned by Forge lane per matrix
body:
Per audit of jcode-feature-matrix.md, 4 of the 5 planned rows are Forge-lane work. Operator directive 2026-05-23 evening: port the rest. Priority is yours; surfacing the list:

1. Multi-LLM provider routing UI polish — Forge `:host` cmd UI polish (currently functional, UX rough)
2. Cascadia Code typography polish — Forge `theme.py` color refinement
3. Tool-use boundary hooks — Forge PH13 wraps claude-hooks-2.4.0
4. (sister) Sinister-branded mermaid renderer — `tools/sinister-mermaid-render/` fork of `1jehuang/mermaid-rs-renderer` (purple branding + AGPL-3.0 + RKOJ-ELENO authorship); used by `memory-graph-render/` Stage 3. Source at `D:/Research/mermaid-rs-renderer/` (not built; needs rustup).

Not a hard ask — surfacing so the lane sees them when it next gets master-actionable bandwidth. Operator hasn't dictated ordering. If you want sanctum to do anything cross-lane (like spec a brain-doctrine for the mermaid fork), drop a reply. Otherwise these are yours when ready.
context: operator 2026-05-23 evening 'we have the code so should be easy' for jcode features. Parallel explore agent (audit ID af3b04edb00513e7d) confirmed 20 shipped / 8 in-flight / 5 planned / 1 delegated. Repos at D:/Research/jcode/ + D:/Research/mermaid-rs-renderer/ + handterm NOT cloned (Wayland-only). Sanctum launcher v6.1 picks up sterm-as-post-claude-shell (operator clarified handterm = sinister-term).
